# Account Invoice Mode Daily

% !!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!
% !! This file is generated by oca-gen-addon-readme !!
% !! changes will be overwritten.                   !!
% !!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!
% !! source digest: sha256:3bbf4cdd991e33640adf8017d21632e0cf73728914ca09e747f998ba0b483395
% !!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!

{{ badge1 }} {{ badge2 }} {{ badge3 }} {{ badge4 }} {{ badge5 }}

This module allows to select a daily invoicing mode for a customer.
It is based on `account_invoice_base_invoicing_mode`.
When this mode is selected for a customer, the customer will be automatically
invoiced

**Table of contents**

```{contents}
:local: true
```

Bugs are tracked on [GitHub Issues](https://github.com/OCA/account-invoicing/issues).

methods.name: odoo.addons.account_invoice_mode_daily.models.sale_order.SaleOrder.cron_generate_daily_invoices
documentation: Cron called daily to check if daily invoicing needs to be done.

methods.name: odoo.addons.account_invoice_mode_daily.models.sale_order.SaleOrder.generate_daily_invoices
documentation:
Generate daily invoices for customers who require that mode.

Invoices will be generated by other jobs split for different customer
and different payment term.

methods.name: odoo.addons.account_invoice_mode_daily.models.sale_order.SaleOrder._company_daily_invoicing
documentation: Get company ids for which today is daily invoicing day.

methods.name: odoo.addons.account_invoice_mode_daily.models.sale_order.SaleOrder._get_groupby_fields_for_daily_invoicing
documentation: Returns the sale order fields used to group them into jobs.

documentation: Check multiple sale order one partner diverse terms.

documentation: Check multiple sale order grouped in one invoice

documentation: For same customer invoice 2 sales order separately.
